generated_by.method: LLM-assisted legal-to-event account mapping with template rules

mapping_principles: Map event substance to debit-credit templates under TT200 accounts
Enforce full evidence and journal traceability per Accounting Law 2015
Mark complex events as manual_review_required when one-size mapping is unsafe
Use valid_from-valid_to fields for future legal/version updates
